zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Ursula Ann Yates於1515年1月5日出生在英國波克夏韋斯特 韓尼時，她的父親John Yates50歲，母親Alice de La Hyde37歲。她於1539年與Henry Brounker在英國維爾爾梅爾可善姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年4月在英國波克夏邦藍享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Ursula Ann Yates于1515年1月5日出生在英国波克夏韋斯特 韓尼时，她的父亲John Yates50岁，母亲Alice de La Hyde37岁。她于1539年与Henry Brounker在英国維爾爾梅爾可善姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年4月在英国波克夏邦藍享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Yates
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English yates ‘gates’, plural of yate, Old English geat ‘gate’, hence a topographic or occupational name for someone who lived by the gates of a town or castle and who probably acted as the gatekeeper or porter. Compare Gates . Alternatively, a variant of the singular form Yate, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Yeats
meanings: Scottish and northern English: variant of   Yates  .

variants.name: Yeatman
meanings: English (southern): occupational name for a gate-keeper, from Middle English yate + man. Compare Yates .

variants.name: Gates
meanings: English: variant of Gate with plural or excrescent -s. The English surname Gate has three possible origins: (i) a topographic name from Middle English gate ‘gate’ (Old English geat, dative plural gatum), denoting someone who lived by a gate or set of gates (possibly sometimes an occupational name for a gate keeper; compre Yates); (ii) in northern England, the East Midlands, and East Anglia, a topographic name from Middle English gate ‘street, road, path’ (Old Norse gata) for someone who lived by a road (compare Street ); (iii) a nickname meaning ‘goat’, from northern Middle English gate, gait (Old English gāt, Old Norse geitr).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French Barrière (see Barriere ).

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Ursula Ann Yates was born on 5 January 1515, in West Hanney, Berkshire, England, her father, John Yates, was 50 and her mother, Alice de La Hyde, was 37. She married Henry Brounker in 1539, in Melksham, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in April 1583, in Buckland, Berkshire, England, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Ursula Ann Yates est née le 5 janvier 1515, à West Hanney, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, John Yates, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Alice de La Hyde, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Brounker en 1539, à Melksham, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1583, à Buckland, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Ursula Ann Yates am 5. Januar 1515 in West Hanney, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Yates 50 und ihre Mutter Alice de La Hyde 37. Sie hat 1539 in Melksham, Wiltshire, England Henry Brounker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1583 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Buckland, Berkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ursula Ann Yates è nata il il 5 gennaio 1515 nel West Hanney, Berkshire, England, sua padre, John Yates, aveva 50 anni e sua madre, Alice de La Hyde, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Henry Brounker nel 1539, nel Melksham, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1583, nel Buckland, Berkshire, England, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ursula Ann Yatesが1515年1月5日にイギリスバークシュアイアウエスト ハニーで生まれた時，父John Yatesは50歳，母Alice de La Hydeは37歳であった。1539年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアメルクシャムでHenry Brounkerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1583年4月にイギリスバークシュアイアブックランドで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ursula Ann Yates(이)가 1515년 1월 5일 영국 버크실르 웨스트 해니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Yates(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice de La Hyde(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1539년 영국 윌츠히르 멜크샤에서 Henry Brounker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 4월 영국 버크실르 벅랜드에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ursula Ann Yates nasceu em 5 de janeiro de 1515, em West Hanney, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Yates, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Alice de La Hyde, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Brounker em 1539, em Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1583, em Buckland, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Ursula Ann Yates родилась 5 января 1515 г. в местности вест ханни, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Yates было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice de La Hyde, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Brounker в 1539 г. в местности мелкшам, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1583 г. в местности буккланд, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 68 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Ursula Ann Yates nació el 5 de enero de 1515, en West Hanney, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Yates, tenía 50 años y su mamá, Alice de La Hyde, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Henry Brounker en 1539, en Melksham, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1583, en Buckland, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años.
